query: UPDATE users SET role = 'member' WHERE email = 'greggd.distinctiveos@gmail.com'; SELECT id, email, name, role FROM users WHERE email IN ('greggdisantis@gmail.com', 'gdisantis@distinctiveos.com', 'greggd.distinctiveos@gmail.com');
